name: dmx
description: DevMatrix Workshop MCP gateway — read/write specs (.dmx) and platform wikis (.md) from your own Claude Code, authenticated with a platform-scoped, Workshop-only API key.

api_key.title: DevMatrix Workshop API key
api_key.description: Your Workshop key (starts with dm_live_). Create it in the DevMatrix Workshop under Settings -> API Keys (Workshop key, pick platform(s) + read/write). It is platform-scoped and Workshop-only. Stored in your OS keychain, never in plaintext.
